title: TEMPORARY AND PERMANENT STAFFING AND JOB PLACEMENT - 211info
text: ALL STAR LABOR & STAFFING PORTLAND/TIGARD TEMPORARY AND PERMANENT STAFFING AND JOB PLACEMENT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides temporary-to-hire and direct-hire employment opportunities. 14463 SW Pacific Highway Tigard, OR 97224 Eligibility: Age 16 and older Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-noon and 1pm-5pm Email (503) 619-0811 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 619-0811 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or email for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: State ID card, Social Security card LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Clackamas, Multnomah, and Washington Counties TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Take Pacific Hwy and turn at Canterbury Lane. Enter parking lot where the All Star office is located in a stand alone building. TriMet bus line 94 Services: Ex-Offender Employment Programs Job Finding Assistance If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. ALL STAR LABOR & STAFFING PORTLAND/TIGARD
